code:
import io
import string

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn get_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut p = 0
mut neg = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  while i < n and is_space(get_byte(line, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut start = i
  while i < n and not is_space(get_byte(line, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < i
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        p = p + v
      else if v < 0
        neg = neg + v
      end
    when None
    end
  end
end

let r = p - neg
println("r=#{r}")
